title: dev-story-26-retry-storm
description:
A repeated failure pattern is present for story 26 on the dev persona. This interval adds one more failed dev run at 2026-05-28T11:10:30.101792+00:00 with the same error text, "tests not green after run," and the watcher note states this is the third quick successive failure across adjacent watcher windows. The error text does not identify a root cause, but the repetition on the same story/persona indicates a localized retry storm rather than an isolated transient.

Impact appears limited to the affected story rather than the whole factory. In this window there is no corroborating queue stall, tick-duration anomaly, or meaningful spend signal, and the failed run cost is small. A git commit and push were still recorded immediately after the failed run, which suggests activity continued in the worktree despite the failed completion state.

This is not the same factory-wide truncation pattern described in prior concerns; it is a new, story-specific repeated failure with low diagnostic clarity. The most plausible reading from the available evidence is sustained trouble on one story/persona path, but the bundle does not show whether the underlying cause is factory infrastructure or story-domain test behavior.

evidence.summary_excerpt: Story 26’s dev run failed again with the same ambiguous error, "tests not green after run," following the prior window’s two similar failures; this now forms a three-attempt cluster on one story/persona.

escalation_reason: no L3 needed yet — clear retry pattern on one story/persona, but the error is ambiguous and current evidence does not localize the cause to factory infrastructure
